description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single job named pages (in the default test stage) that runs the commands 'yarn install' and './node_modules/.bin/gatsby build --prefix-paths', then publishes the generated public/ folder as a pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the master branch and to deploy the artifact to GitLab Pages. Ensure the cache and artifact paths are correctly specified.
